SEARCH
Package io.github.javainvaders

Class Game

java.lang.Object
io.github.javainvaders.Game
public class Game extends Object
Core gameplay class. Owns the entity lists, runs the update loop, handles collisions and draws every gameplay frame. Menu transitions and save/load are delegated to Screen and Save.
Author:
Larissa R. G.; Vinicius S. F.

    • batch

      final com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.g2d.SpriteBatch batch
      Batch for drawing text on top of the game.

      final com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.glutils.ShapeRenderer shapes
      Renderer for ships, aliens, bullets, etc.

      Player p1
      Player one (cyan ship).

      Player two (lime ship).

      The alien grid.

    • explosions

      Active explosion animations.

    • level

      int level
      Current level number (1-3).

    • bombTimer

      private float bombTimer
      Countdown until next bomb is droped.

    • bombInterval

      private float bombInterval
      How often (seconds) a bomb drops. Decreases with level.

    • alienMoveTimer

      private float alienMoveTimer
      Countdown until aliens take another step.

    • alienMoveInterval

      private float alienMoveInterval
      Time between alien movement ticks. Decreases with level.

    • alienMoveState

      AlienMoveState alienMoveState
      Mutable alien movement state (direction and descend flag).

    • levelCompleteTimer

      float levelCompleteTimer
      Countdown shown on the level-complete screen.

    • bonusAwarded

      int[] bonusAwarded
      Bonus points awarded to each player at level end.

    • saveFeedbackTimer

      float saveFeedbackTimer
      Timer driving the "Saved!" feedback text fade.

    • loaded

      boolean loaded
      Set during loadGame so initLevel doesnt reset the loaded player state.

    • initialShootTimer

      private float initialShootTimer
      Short grace period at level start so holding shoot doesnt instantly fire a bullet.

    • main

      final Main main
      Reference back to main so we can flip currentScreen.

    • currentScreen

      Screen.State currentScreen
      Which screen is active — written by Screen callbacks too.

  • Constructor Details

    • Game

      public Game(Main main, com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.g2d.SpriteBatch batch, com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.glutils.ShapeRenderer shapes, com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.g2d.BitmapFont font)
      Creates the Game and grabs the shared rendering resources from Main.
      Parameters:
      main - the Main instance (used for screen-state transitions)
      batch - shared SpriteBatch
      shapes - shared ShapeRenderer
      font - shared regular BitmapFont

  • Method Details

    • startNewGame

      public void startNewGame()
      Starts a fresh game from level 1 with full lives.

    • initLevel

      void initLevel()
      Initialises (or re-initialises) the current level. If loaded is true, player stats are left untouched so the loaded save data persists through the call.

    • updateGame

      public void updateGame(float dt)
      Main update step while in the GAMEPLAY state. Delegates movement, shooting, alien ticks and collision to helpers.
      Parameters:
      dt - delta time in seconds

    • dropBomb

      private void dropBomb()
      Picks a random alive alien to drop a bomb. Does nothing if none alive.

    • checkCollisions

      private void checkCollisions()
      Checks bullet/alien, bomb/player, and alien/player collisions.

    • cleanUp

      private void cleanUp()
      Removes any explosions whose timer has run out.

    • updateLevelComplete

      public void updateLevelComplete(float dt)
      Handles the level-complete countdown and transitions to next level or game-over.

    • renderGame

      public void renderGame()
      Draws the entire gameplay frame: ships, aliens, bullets, bombs, HUD.
